sections.paragraph: [Bigvai], pr.n. of a man, a leader who returned from the exile with Zerubbabel, Ezr 2:2, 14 Ezr 2:14 8:14 Neh 7:19, perhaps husbandman, gardener, Ch. בְּגָאִי husbandman, ܒܳܓܳܐ garden, which has also passed into the Persic, باغ bagh, a garden [“or i.q. Pers. Βαγαῖος, Herod. iii. 128; according to Bohlen, Sanscr. bagî, bagasan, happy.” Ges. add.]
